PERUVIAN SACRED ADVENTURE S.R.LTDA company from Cusco that has extensive experience tourism the national level. For more than years has been executing objective manner the provision tourist services the different modalities tourism, especially the form adventure through walking and trekking trekking within the Cusco region and the Red Caminos Inka the Historic Sanctuary Machu Picchu from the year 2005 the present.
R.LTDA has the corresponding authorizations Law, compliance with Supreme Decree 004-2016-MINCETUR that regulates the provision the Travel agency service stated the Certificate 346-2017-GR-CUSCO DIRCETUR-DT issued the Department Foreign Trade and Tourism Cusco. Operating License 005956 our premises issued the Municipality Cusco and the authorization 0145 operation the Inka Road Network issued the Headquarters the Historic Sanctuary Machu Picchu SERNANP January 2016 effective until this year and temporarily expanded according the new tourist use regulation the SHM. have the Constancy the Code Conduct ESNNA issued MINCETUR, are also active members the Association Tourism Agencies Cusco-AATC.
Our travel agency and Tourism has extensive experience the conduct and operation activities the form adventure tourism the different tourist attractions our country being the most requested the Inka Trail Machupicchu its different routes well Salkantay, Lares Choquequirao, Huchuyqosqo, Wininkunka, Ausangate, Vilcabamba, Pumamarca, Ancascocha etc. among others and outside the Cusco region.

weren't for his buddies, Draymond may have never seen the banner.

The sun slowly sinks the sky, touching the spot where the water meets the sky spectacular blast colors. Instagram filter needed here! Bring the ohana family and experience these amazing sunsets for yourself from the private lanai Poipu Palms 302.
Inside, you'll find new furnishings and new wood laminate flooring. Open and airy, the fully-equipped kitchen has everything you'll need for meal prep, including coffee and condiments. Having the ocean right out the kitchen window while your cooking doesn't hurt either!
Sit down for meals the 4-person dining table, with room for more the kitchen bar. The oceanfront views continue the living room, where patio doors let the outside in. Crash the couch armchair, doing little channel surfing the flat-screen with cable.
Both bedrooms have fun tropical décor, queen beds and en-suite bathrooms, ideal for two couples traveling together. You also get all the comforts home with amenities like Wi-Fi, washer and dryer, linens and beach towels and starter kit paper and cleaning supplies.
Sea Turtles, Dolphins and Whales...Oh My!: Grab front-row seat the private lanai amazing show. From your perch the top floor, you'll see turtles and dolphins play the waves year round, and humpback whales swim through the area the winter months.
Upscale Pool and Deck: Clear your going want spend all day soaking the sun the gorgeous deck with multiple levels, tiki hut and lounge chairs. Splash down the plunge pool cool off with the waves the Pacific rolling the background.
Quiet Condo Complex: Part the intimate Poipu Palms community, the condo one and sits the top floor for privacy, peace and quiet.
Gather the beach chairs, umbrellas and sand toys and walk the minutes down pretty Poipu Beach. you've got enough stuff for army, pack the car instead and make the quick 2-minute drive.
you want get the blood pumping, hike the Maha'ulepu Heritage Trail, which chock full amazing photo stops perfect for Instagramming. Adrenaline junkies will love zip lining, aerial obstacle courses and wide variety watersports.
The building from the street view looks little dated. The unit itself very nice. updated and fresh. Very clean. The rear wood deck beautiful tropical hard wood.The view spectacular. You feel like you are the water. --- Mahalo, Ben!
Balkony, Location, Pool and View are wonderful! Apartment could have been cleaner, still had very nice stay!
Poipu Palms 302 just advertised lovely views out into cove (we watched lot sea turtles and even saw few spinner dolphins passing through). There are effectively two suites, which gave plenty room spread out and would give two couples enough privacy. The lanai and living room were wonderful places relax. easy walk (0.5 mi) the Grand Hyatt (several restaurants and beach) Brenneckes Bar (laid back) and beach-front park. Everything was clean and the kitchen had everything needed for breakfast, lunches simple dinner. The condo was quiet area noisy neighbors and (somehow!) none the roosters Kauai infamous for. GVR great work with very responsive and helped with few special requests.
friend had medical emergency the day after arrived, and attempts reach 911 didn't work; I'm not sure why. Not knowing what else do, called the GVR office explain what was happening, and Janie think was Janie) stayed the line with while contacting the paramedic squad. Within minutes, the emt crew was there, and shortly after that, Mark arrived ask there was anything GVR could do. That gesture meant great deal. stayed for least half hour, make sure were OK. Thank goodness friend recovered and were able enjoy the rest our vacation. Everyone GVR was friendly and helpful, and genuinely interested making our stay pleasant one. MANAGER RESPONSE: are glad that everything worked out for your friend. What scary experience! Glad could help anyway possible. hope see you again!
enjoyed everything about the property! The location superb; the amenities (including the toiletries!) are great. Having dishwasher detergent and Tide pods supplied was plus. The lovely dishes added much ambiance with their colorful fish and ocean design. The balcony was perfectly situated allow the best ocean view, and spent many relaxing hours there, just watching the waves come and go. Very peaceful and quiet! MANAGER RESPONSE: Mahalo! hope see you again soon!
Very impressed. Bruce was "goto" guy and was very attentive and responsive. had one issue that was NOT related the property itself GVR but different property manager unit below ours. contacted Bruce and instantly got things resolved and came with resolution. was over and beyond what expected.
This property very well equipped with little amenities that made very special. The furnishings and condition this rental extremely nice. will great pleasure any and all who stay here.
Our stay Puipo Palms was great! The location was unbeatable with awesome views. The pool, though small, was never crowded and has beautiful ocean views. You could hear and see the waves crashing (and sea turtles swimming!) right from the patio. The beach was easy minute drive with easy parking 10-15 minute walk. The beach was great for snorkeling (we even swam with sea turtles and saw the monk seals playing the water feet from us!) The waves can intense but this beach well protected and great for kiddos though not crowded. Breneckes restaurant right across the street had the best lunch and drinks! There are plenty shops and other restaurants another minutes down the road. The only complaint had that one the beds firm opted sleep the couch instead. The other bed, though softer, squeaked and sagged little. informed the hosts and they came out and looked them. They did some adjusting the bed that squeaked and didn't have any trouble after that but still didn't sleep the firm one. you're looking for place stay with awesome beds, this might not the one for you. The internet was also little spotty you had more than couple devices connected. Otherwise the apartment was clean and the kitchen was well stocked, complete with blender. The only thing were missing was coffee grinder and they brought one right away when asked. They provide list farmers markets attend and great reference books for what the island. would definitely stay Poipu again!
Lovely stay. had great surprise when saw the pool. You should promote the property description.
The view unbelievable! saw dolphins and sea turtle right out the balcony.
Never actually spoke them personally, just emailing back and forth. Great response from everyone with answers questions, etc. And asked about possible early check because were going arrive early- was about call and actually got text that was ready. Great timing!!
Beautiful spot, close the beach and short drive Nice and clean and well stocked with everything you need. Great lanai just sit and watch the ocean. Very comfortable beds and lots room. Lots fans and the set the windows lets the air move around the condo nicely- never got hot inside! Pool area was adequate- not large pool, but nice take dip -I'd rather the beach anyway Overall excellent stay!!
Great location and price. Right the water and right the street from Poipu beach. Had everything you needed rental and was very comfortable. GVR was great communicating check info and making sure had everything needed. Highly recommend staying here.
Excellent stay with all amenities included. Lots kitchen utensils and beach gear, the staff have definitely thought everything you can have worry-free vacation and feel home.
Each team member was extremely helpful. They answered all questions promptly and with positive attitude. They were all very friendly.
always, our stay Poipu Palms was excellent. enjoyed the beautiful views and the great condo. were impressed with the amenities available such shampoos, conditions, soap (which smelled wonderful), toilet paper, paper towels, etc. The staff was extremely helpful with making sure had everything needed and were comfortable. This was our first trip with our daughter (she and this area was perfect. were able have pak play delivered use before even arrived, enjoyed taking her the newly remodeled pool area which was great and was even able late checkout which was very helpful with hour daughter. enjoyed the welcoming and departing text messages-very thoughtful!!! will back soon MANAGER'S RESPONSE: glad that you enjoyed your stay with us. Our goal sure our guests are enjoying themselves while staying with us. hope you get opportunity come back and stay with again someday and bring you daughter!!!
This team was amazing. tend have lot questions and want make sure every box checked, and sometimes rechecked. They were helpful and always responded timely manor. loved that they texted soon landed that our condo was ready for check and let know what number contact had any more questions. MANAGER RESPONSE: Mahalo for your review! happy hear that you enjoyed your stay. Also, nice hear that our texting service helpful. sort new for and love it! Hope see you again soon.
This property was fantastic! its small unit complex never felt like there were too many people around. The unit was perfect for and had everything needed make feel like were home. loved laying the pool the end the day and watching the turtles below. The one thing would like mention that the grill charcoal grill and the coals were sometimes hard keep lit due the breeze. There also cover for takes little longer for somethings cook.
They were always really nice and got back within reasonable amount time. The unit number they originally sent was not accurate but once called they were easily able figure out and everything went perfectly after that.
The view was fantastic. were able see whale spouting well dolphins from our balcony.

Sometimes you only have one friend. (Hey, it's better than not having any, right?) Regardless whether you are looking play game with your significant other, your best friend, some person that you just met, there time and place where you need good two-player game. So, here's list current favorites.
Not every game has deep and strategic order lot fun. And, Jab great little real-time game when you're looking for something quick but engaging. can bit problem when you and your opponent aren't evenly matched, might best pick one person that you play Jab with and reserve for them.
For some reason, abstract strategy games tend two-player. could have easily made list two-player games simply consisting them (but, you want that, you should really check out top ten abstract strategy games). Regardless, Arimaa great game it's own right, and would remiss not include it.
Well, the United States, currently have two-party political system. And, we've had since well before the 1960's. And so, it's only natural that there should games made about this very important aspect our country. Whether you find actual politics fascinating, are somewhat apathetic about them, you still might find 1960 fun game.
So, this point you may throwing flag and pointing out that Game Thrones: The (Living) Card Game states that 2-4 player. Yes, you would right, and this game technically breaks criteria. Yet, opinion this game was designed two player game with rules for additional players tacked later (like with Magic, Star Trek: CCG, and many others). Regardless that, Game Thrones fabulous game where you are constantly struggling back and forth with your opponent number different "challenges". Since first tried this game, became hooked and just wish that played more.
Returning the abstract strategy genre, Hive makes appearance the list. This could honestly considered low position for Hive, could easily have beaten out most the games above it, depending when put this list together. When think about two-player games, Hive one the first that comes mind, and one that enjoy sharing with others.
Jaipur can considered the "significant other specialty." (Yes, just made that term up.) all the games this list, think that this the best one for playing with "non-gamer" spouse. Sure, some you may married people that love play games just much you do. However, the more common scenario seems marriages which one person loves play games drastically more than the other. For these situations, think that Jaipur may ideal game play with your special someone.
The game abstract strategy list only manages make this one. This one was hard for rank, abstract games feel different than "traditional" strategy games. fact, when first thought about this list, completely neglected all abstract strategies then remembered them and had way too many games. So, happy medium, I've added the three you see with Dvonn being the top representative the genre once again.
One the best two player games come out the last few years Summoner Wars. Though don't play much I'd like (isn't that the story this entire list?), have continued buying every expansion they come out because know... some day.... will play more! And that point will have dozens factions that can use.
Really, did this surprise anybody? I'm guessing no. said review, Twilight Struggle enough fun tempt give this site that can dedicate more time playing instead learning new games. Though not flawless, immaculate tug war that epitomizes what two player game can be!
This top ten list really had lot titles that was sad whittle away. could have easily justified including Star Wars: The (Living) Card Game Android: Netrunner, but didn't want list too many Card Games. was also shocked when didn't have enough room for Jambo. few others that just barely missed the cut were Dungeon Command, Mage Wars, and Lord the Rings: The Confrontation. Finally, Crokinole, which would have been lone dexterity entry, only missed the cut because the technicality that can played two four players.
think Axis and Allies Battle the Bulge great two player game. have had great deal fun with it.
Interesting. I've played some the other Axis and Allies offshoots, but not that one. Thanks for the tip!
You don't even list Lost Cities Balloon Cup? I'm not saying they are the best the world, though love them, and not saying Jab bad game. However. Both them are not even the Honorable Mention list.
Just kidding. need play more from your list. enjoy playing board games with wife and I'm always the hunt for new titles try.
So, didn't really care for Lost Cities all that much. It's not "bad", but wasn't for (or, more specifically, wife hated it).
haven't tried Balloon Cup, but hear good things about it, may need change that the near future.
Major agreement Jaipur and Summoner Wars.
recommendation for light 2-player game, wife and enjoy Perry Rhodan (even the movement rules were written someone with grasp orbital mechanics).
 saw Perry Rhodan sitting around FLGS Joplin for months, but the game never looked interesting enough try. Maybe missed the boat that one.
Out curiosity what didn't you like from Lost Cities.
Sure, the theme negligible, and very mathy, but LOVE messing with the draw options affect the speed the game.
wife didn't like the constant mathy-ness. Overall, just didn't engage much with the game. It's been couple years since I've played it, it's hard remember exactly what didn't click.
Great list Josh. Looks like need pick some more 2-player games. Balloon Cup currently out print, but believe that Rio Grande planning reprint with new title, Pinata, believe.
